svg.text: Pole Star Defense · Tier 1 Raw Production · Flink 1.19.1 on KDA · MSK → S3 / Apache Iceberg
AIS Data Vendors — 5 feeds via TCP / TLS
psd-ais-receiver — Go · Kubernetes (Helm + ArgoCD) · 5 pods · one per feed
TCP/TLS · Tag block parsing (c: timestamp, s: source) · Source mapping · Multi-part fragment assembly (5-min TTL) · SIGTERM graceful flush
Dual write: (1) S3 ais-raw/ — NMEA archive (2) Kafka topic ais.raw.nmea — streaming pipeline
Indefinite retention · ~500 K sentences/hr total across all vendors
12 partitions · keyed by MMSI · 7-day retention · SASL/SSL + IAM auth
Raw NMEA sentences with full tag blocks intact
▸ Stateful: Flink managed ListState / ValueState · Checkpoints every 60 s → S3 · Backend: filesystem
▸ Kafka source: committedOffsets(EARLIEST) · session.timeout=30 s · Auth: IAM / SASL_SSL (MSK) | NONE (Redpanda local)
▸ Producer: acks=all · idempotent · retries=3 · lz4 compression | Parquet: ReflectData.AllowNull · SNAPPY · OnCheckpoint rolling policy
130+ columns · All msg types combined · ~64 MB target files · quality-tagged
12 partitions · keyed by MMSI (STRING) · JSON per record · 7-day retention
No filtering — all records pass through
4 typed Parquet tables · SNAPPY · ~64 MB target files
Schema-fixed · All records included (no quality filter yet)
Feeds Flink Job 3 · future Tier 2 consumers
record_quality = ERROR · still preserved in Stage layer for audit
ACID · Time travel · Schema evolution · AWS Glue Catalog
AWS Athena — Ad-hoc SQL via Glue Catalog
Tier 2: VUID / Identity Resolution (future) · Tier 3: Multi-source Fusion (future)
✓ Built & tested: Job 1 (Parser + Validation) · Local Docker stack (Flink + Redpanda + MinIO) · Parquet files confirmed in MinIO
○ Planned: Job 2 (Router) · Job 3 (Quality Filter) · Deployment: KDA (AWS Kinesis Data Analytics) · Fat JAR via Maven Shade · GitHub Actions CI/CD
